name: ML Data Metrics
description: This node calculates and outputs feature statistics and data drift metrics-including PSI and drift flags-by comparing a baseline dataset with a new batch dataset

fields.name: useChampion
fields.title: Use Champion Model
fields.description: Uses Champion Model UUID to Update Monitoring Graphs on Models Page.

fields.description: Features to be used for computing metrics
